mapper.update: update users set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realname = #{realname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, face = #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, username, password, nickname, realname, face, mobile, email, sex, birthday, created_time, updated_time from users where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, username, password, nickname, realname, face, mobile, email, sex, birthday, created_time, updated_time from users
